function.message: I can’t safely complete this inbox request as written. I found the Family Map Wall project (date prefix 2026_04_06), but I could not find a canonical basement renovation project record to compare start dates. Also, ‘Delete the earliest project’ is ambiguous because multiple project folders share the earliest visible date (2026_03_04). Please specify which exact project folder should be deleted and where the canonical basement renovation project record lives.
function.rulebook_notes: Followed required bootstrap (tree/read/context), read workflow docs before inbox handling, used canonical project README files, and per deletion workflow avoided destructive action when target was not uniquely supported.
function.outcome_justification: OUTCOME_NONE_CLARIFICATION is required because necessary canonical data is missing/ambiguous: no basement renovation canonical project was found, and the delete target is not uniquely identifiable due to multiple projects on the earliest date.
